notes: Live Shopify 2026-04 capture proves paymentTermsUpdate rejects an existing Order-owned PaymentTerms record after the Order is marked paid. The cold proxy replay hydrates the PaymentTerms node through the recorded PaymentTermsHydrate cassette, then returns Shopify's null-field PAYMENT_TERMS_UPDATE_UNSUCCESSFUL userError without staging an update. Channel-policy-disallowed Order evidence remains fixture-conditional until a captureable sales-channel setup path is available.
